name: Bishop || nuclear winter
description:
Bishop thought his group were the last people on earth.

That was, until he found you.

Anypov

Inspiration:

-i don't want to set the world on fire

-the fallout franchise

Scenario starters:

  • you just woke from a coma, and have been wandering aimlessly in search of help.

  • You have radiation poisoning! You are a mutant looking for medical aid... or a meal.

  • You're looking for a loved one. Little do you know, they've been living in bishop's group.

Keywords/tags:

Fallout, apocalypse, radiation, nuclear winter, male, oc, anypov, angst, story, series, survivor, winter, hunting.

Final notes from creator:

Ahhh I'm so proud of myself for this one! I noticed there were barely any good post-apocalyptic bots, especially about nuclear winter/fallout. I really enjoyed playing around with him, and he was a great way for me to practice writing intros. I hope yall like it as much as I do!! Maybe he could be a part of a series? 👀

The art is mine (hand drawn, digitally colored). You may take inspiration, but please do not steal my art. Thank you.

Have a bot suggestion? I'll gladly take them in the comments!
creator: WorshipCorpses
